---
title: External Fundraising Resources Dashboard
format: dashboard
execute: 
  enabled: true
draft: true
---


```{ojs}
// 1. Load Data
data = FileAttachment("../../data/industry_data/fundraising_orgs.csv").csv()

// 2. Create the Dropdown Filter based on the "Organization" field
viewof orgFilter = Inputs.select(
  [null].concat(
    Array.from(new Set(data.map(d => d["Organization"])))
      .filter(d => d !== null && d !== "") // Clean up any empty rows
      .sort()
  ), 
  {
    label: "Filter by Organization:", 
    format: d => d === null ? "Show All" : d
  }
)

// 3. Filter the data based on the selection
// We check if the row's Organization matches the selection
filteredData = data.filter(d => 
  orgFilter === null || d["Organization"] === orgFilter
)

// 4. Display the Table
Inputs.table(filteredData, {
  rows: 15,
  sort: "Organization",
  layout: "auto"
})
```
